goal: Create and test one deterministic AlphaForge alpha candidate
strategist_task: Create a new alpha candidate file at alphaforge/src/alphaforge/candidates/mean_reversion_5d.py that implements a simple 5-day mean reversion factor. The factor should compute the z-score of the latest close relative to the rolling 5-day mean and standard deviation, then return -zscore (so high zscore -> sell signal). Include a function `generate_signals(data: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series` that takes a DataFrame with columns ['date','close'] and returns a Series of signals aligned by date. Also create a companion test script at alphaforge/src/alphaforge/candidates/test_mean_reversion_5d.py that tests the factor on synthetic data (e.g., a sine wave with noise) and prints the following report fields in its output: train_start, train_end, test_start, test_end, n_combinations, metric (use IC between signals and forward 1-day returns as the metric). In the completion summary, explicitly include these fields with their values.
gate_reasons:
Changes outside allowed paths:
?? alphaforge/src/alphaforge/alphas/
?? alphaforge/src/alphaforge/factors/alpha_volume_trend.py
?? scripts/backtest_alpha_momentum.py
?? test_alpha_volume_trend.py
?? tools/momentum_factor_research/
Report missing required fields: train_start, train_end, test_start, test_end, n_combinations, metric
